Acceptance Criteria: Create project and assign LAQ360 to self-rater(s) raters and leaders
Action:
1. Login to Admin Portal (Test env)
2. Navigate to Projects section
3. Click 'Create New Project'
4. Enter project details
5. Select LAQ360 assessment type
6. Assign self-rater(s)
7. Assign raters
8. Assign leaders
9. Save project
Data: Valid project name: 'LAQ360_Test_Project_001', Valid self-rater emails, Valid rater emails, Valid leader emails
Expected Result: Project created successfully with LAQ360 assigned to all specified participants. Confirmation message displayed.

Acceptance Criteria: Successfully generate reports from Envisia
Action:
1. Complete LAQ360 assessment for project
2. Navigate to Reports section
3. Select project
4. Generate CSV report from Envisia
5. Download report
Data: Completed LAQ360 project with all assessments done
Expected Result: CSV report generated successfully. Report downloads without errors.

Acceptance Criteria: Ensure scoring & reporting is consistent
Action:
1. Generate LAQ360 CSV report
2. Compare scores in CSV with Envisia system scores
3. Verify all score columns match
Expected Result: Scores in CSV extract match exactly with Envisia system scores. No discrepancies found.

Acceptance Criteria: Ensure scoring & reporting is consistent
Action:
1. Generate LAQ360 CSV report
2. Verify all data columns are populated
3. Cross-reference with Research Team specifications
Expected Result: All expected columns present. Data format matches Research Team specifications.

Acceptance Criteria: Ensure scoring & reporting is consistent
Action:
1. Generate multiple reports for same project
2. Compare CSV outputs
Data: Same completed project, Multiple report generation
Expected Result: Reports are identical. Scoring is consistent across multiple generations.

Acceptance Criteria: Ensure scoring & reporting is consistent
Action:
1. Attempt to generate report for incomplete assessment
2. Verify system behavior
Expected Result: System either prevents report generation or clearly indicates incomplete data status.

Acceptance Criteria: Ensure scoring & reporting is consistent
Action:
1. Generate CSV report
2. Verify numeric score values are within valid range
3. Check for null/empty values in required fields
Expected Result: All numeric scores within valid range (e.g.
Priority: 1-5 or defined scale). No unexpected nulls in required fields.

Acceptance Criteria: Document results and notify PO
Action:
1. Generate LAQ360 CSV report
2. Document test results
3. Send notification to PO
Data: Completed test execution, Valid PO contact
Expected Result: Results documented in specified format. PO receives notification with test summary.

Acceptance Criteria: E2E CSV Extract through Admin Portal
Action:
1. Login to Admin Portal
2. Create new project
3. Assign LAQ360 to participants
4. Complete all assessments
5. Generate CSV extract
6. Validate extract content
7. Document and notify
Expected Result: End-to-end flow completes without errors. CSV extract contains accurate data for all participants.

Acceptance Criteria: E2E CSV Extract through Admin Portal
Action:

Expected Result: Access denied. User redirected to login page. No data exposed.
